creator: flathill@flathill.gr.jp
text:
Hi,

andy>   I'm using 3.1-RELEASE. Can you explain your environment?
andy>   And does anyone have such problem with patched ncurses?

I'm using 4.0-CURRENT(19990506-SNAP).
And type 'make package' in ncurses port directory.

- Seiichirou Hiraoka
  flathill@flathill.gr.jp : http://www.flathill.gr.jp/~flathill/
